error.capacity_details: hloka di-bits tse %d, bokgoni bo boholo ho k=1 ke di-bits tse %d
error.empty_coefficients: selae sa coefficient ha sea lokela ho ba se se na letho
error.empty_password: phasewete e ke ke ea ba letho
error.header_embed_failed: e hlolehile ho kenya sehlooho sa molaetsa: %v
error.insufficient_capacity: molaetsa o moholo haholo bakeng sa bokgoni bo fumanehang ba coefficient
error.insufficient_coefficients: li-coefficient tse sa lekaneng nakong ea ho kenya: hloka %d, ke fumane %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: li-coefficient tse sa lekaneng tse ka sebelisoang bakeng sa ho kenya hlooho: ho hlokahala li-bit tse 32, ho fumanoe li-coefficient tse ka sebelisoang tsa %d feela
error.invalid_code_word: lentsoe la khoutu le ke ke la ba le letho
error.invalid_coefficient_range: boleng ba coefficient bo kantle ho sebaka se nepahetseng (-2048 ho isa ho 2047)
error.invalid_force_k: ForceK e sa sebetseng: e tlameha ho ba 0 (auto) kapa 1-8
error.invalid_k_parameter: paramethara ea k e tlameha ho ba pakeng tsa 1 le 8
error.matrix_encode_failed: ho kenya khoutu ya matrix ho hlolehile bakeng sa lentswe la khoutu: %v
error.message_too_large: boholo ba molaetsa bo feta boholo bo lumelletsoeng (li-byte tse 8,388,607)
error.nil_random_source: mohloli o sa reroang o ke ke oa ba lefela: sebelisa InitializePRNG(password) kapa u fane ka RandomSource e seng e ntse e peoe
error.permutation_failed: e hlolehile ho hlahisa phetoho ya coefficient: %v

log.capacity_calculated: Bokhoni ba ho sebetsa hantle bo baloa
log.k_selected: Ho khethiloe paramethara e ntle ka ho fetisisa ea k
log.shrinkage_detected: Ho fokotseha ho fumanoe, ho kenngoa hape ha biti
